phases.name: Year 1
phases.subtitle: Explore
phases.description: Introduction to sustainable agriculture and natural resources.

milestones.label: Explore natural resources
milestones.description: Survey of soil conservation, forestry, wildlife, and sustainable agriculture.

milestones.label: Study environmental science
milestones.description: Ecological principles and biogeochemistry for land management.

milestones.label: Build biology foundations
milestones.description: Plant biology and soil ecology for sustainable food production.

milestones.label: Introduction to horticulture
milestones.description: Plant propagation, greenhouse management at NC A&T university farm.

phases.name: Year 2
phases.subtitle: Engage
phases.description: Soil management, sustainable practices, and food systems.

milestones.label: Master soil science
milestones.description: Soil formation, fertility, and conservation with field testing.

milestones.label: Study sustainable land management
milestones.description: Cover cropping, IPM, and regenerative agriculture practices.

milestones.label: Master crop science
milestones.description: Crop physiology and sustainable production systems.

milestones.label: Study food systems
milestones.description: Local/global food systems, food security, and urban agriculture.

phases.name: Year 3
phases.subtitle: Develop
phases.description: Advanced soil, organic agriculture, and precision ag.

milestones.label: Advanced soil management
milestones.description: Advanced soil physics, nutrient cycling, and NRCS conservation planning.

milestones.label: Master organic production
milestones.description: USDA organic certification, composting, and biological pest management.

milestones.label: Conduct research
milestones.description: Experimental design and field research methods for agriculture.

milestones.label: Study precision agriculture
milestones.description: GPS, remote sensing, drones, and variable rate technology.

milestones.label: Complete capstone project
milestones.description: Independent research on sustainable land or food systems.

milestones.label: Complete field internship
milestones.description: Placement at organic farm, NRCS, or food systems organization.

milestones.label: Study agroforestry
milestones.description: Trees with crops/livestock, permaculture, and carbon sequestration.

milestones.label: Finalize career placement
milestones.description: Career prep for USDA, NRCS, Extension, and organic farming.
